title: Git Diff / Edit Distance
description: Git's diff engine uses the Myers algorithm, which finds the shortest edit script (minimum insertions and deletions) to transform one file into another. It exploits optimal substructure: the best diff of two prefixes builds on the best diff of shorter prefixes, a classic DP recurrence.

title: GPS Route Planning
description: Navigation systems use Dijkstra's algorithm, which embodies DP's optimal substructure: the shortest path to any node is built from shortest paths to its predecessors. Dynamic programming tables (distance arrays) are incrementally updated as the algorithm relaxes edges in priority order.

title: Text Wrapping / Knuth-Plass
description: The Knuth-Plass algorithm used in LaTeX formats paragraphs by minimizing total 'badness' (uneven spacing) across all lines simultaneously. It uses DP to evaluate all possible line-break combinations, choosing the globally optimal set rather than greedily breaking line by line.
